---
title: "Contact"
description-meta: "Reach out to me with questions and comments"
title-block-banner: false
---

<left>

Address: Warren G. Magnuson Health Sciences Center, 1959 NE Pacific St, Suite H375, Box 357630, Seattle, WA 98195

<!-- Phone: 510-666-7639 -->

E-mail: skoiso[at]uw.edu


</left>
